steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; update_option('woocommerce_task_list_hidden_lists', array('setup', 'extended')); update_option('woocommerce_onboarding_profile', array('skipped' => true, 'completed' => true, 'is_already_established' => true)); update_option('woocommerce_default_country', 'US:NY'); update_option('woocommerce_currency', 'USD'); ?>

<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; wp_set_current_user(1); if (!isset(WC()->session)) { WC()->session = new WC_Session_Handler(); WC()->session->init(); } if (!isset(WC()->cart)) { WC()->cart = new WC_Cart(); } $product = get_page_by_path('v-neck-t-shirt', OBJECT, 'product'); if ($product) { WC()->cart->add_to_cart($product->ID); WC()->cart->persistent_cart_update(); WC()->session->set_customer_session_cookie(true); } ?>
